name: oleksify-plugins
description: Claude Code plugins: rnd-framework for multi-agent orchestration, tight-loop for single-agent rigor.

plugins.name: rnd-framework
plugins.description: Multi-agent coding orchestration with structured decomposition, dependency-based scheduling, independent verification with information barriers, quality gates, and spec-first accountability.

plugins.name: tight-loop
plugins.description: Single-agent coding rigor: pre-register, implement, self-review with hook-enforced honesty. No orchestration, no subagents, no information barrier — just a tight prompt skill plus four enforcement hooks.
